scripts.app: env-cmd -e _main,production,app-main node scripts/build.js && npx cap sync
scripts.app-local-ios: env-cmd -e _main,development,app-main,app-local-ios node scripts/build.js && npx cap sync
scripts.app-local-android: env-cmd -e _main,development,app-main,app-local-android node scripts/build.js && npx cap sync
scripts.app-staging: env-cmd -e _main,staging,app-main,app-staging node scripts/build.js && npx cap sync
